title: Scrub Daddy Damp Duster, Multipurpose Dusters for Cleaning - Wooden & Venetian Blind Cleaner Tool, Ridged Wet Dust Sponge for Skirting Board, Radiator, Blinds & Mirrors, Home Cleaning Products, Pink
features: Multipurpose Dusters for Cleaning: The Damp Duster simply wipes away dust and debris! The cleaning sponge holds dust to it rather than letting the dust fly away in the breeze. Must have cleaning products for anything from your windows to your fences

Quick as a Flash: Dust Remover that collects and traps dust in one quick wipe! Rinse clean under running water so you can use it time and time again. Dampen the dust sponge with water before each use to soften foam

Useful Home Gadgets: Affordable, reusable and conveniently sized, the Damp Duster removes dust, pollen, pet hair, and more - an ideal venetian blind cleaner tool, skirting board cleaner and radiator cleaner

Dust Corners & Multiple Surfaces: Perfect dust cleaner for use as a radiator cleaner, blind duster, for vents, baseboard, railings, mirrors and more. Removes the need for multiple dust brush cleaning supplies

Durable Cleaning Tools: Wash the wet duster sponge after each use and use it time and time again. Re-moisten before each use to soften the foam. Requires no chemicals for a quality clean, ideal blind cleaners for wooden blinds and other household surfaces
description: From the manufacturer Damp Duster The Damp Duster collects and traps dust in one quick wipe! Wet & Wipe Just wet the Damp Duster and wipe away! Perfect for blinds, vents, baseboards, railings, mirrors & more! Arrives pre-moistened in packaging. Dampen with water before each use to soften foam. Simply Clean Debris Away Great for allergy sufferers as it removes all dust, pollen, pet hair and more! Affordable, reusable & conveniently sizes! Easy Clean The Damp Duster is easy to clean by placing it under running water, so you can use it time and time again!
